summary: See clues file for full details. 3 tossups, 10 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 3 tossups and 10 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: An artist from this country painted Bruno of Cologne witnessing meat turning into ash in front of Carthusian monks.
examples: An artist from this country painted Bruno of Cologne witnessing meat turning into ash in front of Carthusian monks.

clues.clue: Another painter from this country depicted a bearded woman breastfeeding her baby next to a stone slab.
examples: Another painter from this country depicted a bearded woman breastfeeding her baby next to a stone slab.

clues.clue: Strings suspending food in windowsills appear in a genre of paintings from this country such as Quince, Cabbage, Melon and Cucumber.
examples: Strings suspending food in windowsills appear in a genre of paintings from this country such as Quince, Cabbage, Melon and Cucumber.

clues.clue: Another artist from this country painted The Young Beggar and Children Eating Grapes and a Melon.
examples: Another artist from this country painted The Young Beggar and Children Eating Grapes and a Melon.

clues.clue: Cupid holds a pink ribbon and a mirror in front of the title goddess in a painting from this country.
examples: Cupid holds a pink ribbon and a mirror in front of the title goddess in a painting from this country.

clues.clue: A girl steps on a dog on the left of a group portrait from this country around the Infanta Margarita.
examples: A girl steps on a dog on the left of a group portrait from this country around the Infanta Margarita.

clues.clue: The Rokeby Venus and Las Meninas were painted in, for 10 points, what home country of Diego Velazquez?
examples: The Rokeby Venus and Las Meninas were painted in, for 10 points, what home country of Diego Velazquez?

clues.clue: An artist born in this country who painted many scenes showing St.
examples: An artist born in this country who painted many scenes showing St.

clues.clue: Bartholomew splayed as if coming out of the frame during his Martyrdom also painted a club-footed boy holding a paper asking for alms.
examples: Bartholomew splayed as if coming out of the frame during his Martyrdom also painted a club-footed boy holding a paper asking for alms.

clues.clue: That artist from this country formed the Cabal of Naples with an Italian and a Greek painter.
examples: That artist from this country formed the Cabal of Naples with an Italian and a Greek painter.

clues.clue: A painter from this country depicted a pure white lamb with its feet bound in Agnus Dei and painted a saint wearing plain white robes while chained to a barely-visible tree trunk in The Martyrdom of Saint Serapion.
examples: A painter from this country depicted a pure white lamb with its feet bound in Agnus Dei and painted a saint wearing plain white robes while chained to a barely-visible tree trunk in The Martyrdom of Saint Serapion.

clues.clue: An artist from this country reused the model from his Christ in the House of Martha and Mary for a painting of an old woman frying eggs.
examples: An artist from this country reused the model from his Christ in the House of Martha and Mary for a painting of an old woman frying eggs.
